subject: Hindi
chapter: Chapter: Naye Ilaake Mein / Khushboo Rachte Hain Haath (Poetry)

key_points: ‘Naye Ilaake Mein’ kavita badalte huye shahron aur yaaddasht ke bharose na rehne ka sandesh deti hai.
Shehar mein roz nayi imaraten banti hain, jis se purane nishaan (jaise peepal ka ped ya khali maidan) gayab ho jate hain.
Kavi kehte hain ki aaj ke samay mein sab kuch itni jaldi badalta hai ki ek din purana rasta bhi naya lagne lagta hai.
‘Khushboo Rachte Hain Haath’ kavita un mazdooron ke baare mein hai jo duniya ke liye sugandhit Agarbatti bante hain.
Ye mazdoor swayam gandi bastiyon aur badbudar nalon ke paas rehte hain, par doosron ke jeevan mein khushboo phelate hain.
Kavita samaj ki is vidambana (irony) ko dikhati hai ki sundar cheezein banane wale log khud kitne dukh mein rehte hain.
examples: Naye Ilaake Mein: Peepal ka ped kat jana aur purane gharon ki jagah nayi manzilon ka banna.
Khushboo Rachte Hain Haath: Chote bacchon ke naram haath aur buzurgon ke nason wale haath jo din-raat kaam karte hain.
Agarbatti: Kewda, Gulab aur Khus ki khushboo jo gandi bastiyon mein banti hai.
formulas: Pehli Kavita → Badlav + Bhulne ka darr = Nirantar khoj
Doosri Kavita → Mehnat (Gandi Basti) + Utpad (Khushboo) = Samajik bhedbhav
exam_tips: ‘Naye Ilaake Mein’ mein 'Vakt ki kami' aur 'Badlav' ko mukhya bindu banayein.
‘Khushboo Rachte Hain Haath’ mein mazdooron ki sharirik dasha (ghise nakhun, zakhmi haath) ka zikr karein.
Dono kavitaon ke kavi 'Arun Kamal' ka naam yaad rakhein.
Vidambana (Irony) shabd ka prayog Agarbatti wali kavita ke liye karein.
